stemHtml: Given a scenario with specified holding and cruise fuel flow rates, how can you calculate the minimum legal fuel required and estimate the block fuel for the flight?

options.a: Sum the holding and cruise fuel flows for minimum legal fuel; estimate block fuel based on previous flights
options.b: Calculate minimum legal fuel based on holding fuel flow only; estimate block fuel based on aircraft manufacturer's recommendations
options.c: Determine minimum legal fuel based on cruise fuel flow only; estimate block fuel using average fuel consumption rates
options.d: Combine holding and cruise fuel flows for minimum legal fuel; estimate block fuel based on current weather conditions and expected flight duration
